prompt:
Implement CAO Web UI V2 per PRD at ~/cao-ui/CAO_WEBUI_V2_PRD.md.

Features:
1. Agent sessions - spawn Kiro in tmux, loading bar, status detection (WAITING_INPUT alert)
2. Terminal display - xterm.js, live WebSocket streaming
3. Beads CRUD - create/update/delete tasks, assign to agents, auto-mode
4. Activity feed - extract terminal snippets, per-session filtering
5. Chat bar - task decomposition via Kiro
6. Context-updater agent - reviews completed chats, proposes improvements
7. Agent CRUD - create/delete agents from UI

Tech: FastAPI, React+TypeScript, SQLite, WebSockets, tmux.

Read PRD first. Implement in phases. Write tests.

Output <promise>CAO_WEBUI_V2</promise> when complete.
